## IMoldSelectorProps.onAddMold property

Callback when user wants to add a new mold. If not provided, the "Add mold" button is hidden. The callback should open a picker and call actions.addOption() with the selected mold.

**Signature:**

```typescript
onAddMold?: () => void;
```
